title: Ela ve Cik

sidekick.name: Cik
sidekick.description: a tiny yellow songbird (canary), bright lemon-yellow feathers all over, small orange beak, little black bead eyes, cheerful and plump body, small grey twiggy feet. Always the SAME yellow canary — never a different color, never a sparrow or parrot.

description: Ela için Cik sadece bir kuş değildi... küçük tüyleri, neşeli sesi ile en iyi dostuydu. Onun şarkısıyla uyanmayı, onun küçük dünyasına eşlik etmeyi öğrendi. İşte Ela'nın ilk şarkılı dostluk masalı.
style: Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality

characterDescription.base: Turkish child. Exact face, hair, skin tone, and accessories come from the character-profile reference photo. No hardcoded physical traits — the reference photo is the sole source of truth for identity.

scenes.title: Uykudan Uyanış
scenes.text: Ela, yatağında yavaşça gözlerini açtı. Pencereden gelen ışık, yüzünü okşadı.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC {CHILD_NAME} slowly opens her eyes in bed, sunlight gently touches her face., setting: Ela'nın yatak odası, sabah erken, mood: dreamy, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Tatlı Bir Ses
scenes.text: Minik Ela, dışarıdan ince bir ses duydu. 'Cik, cik, cik!' diye ötüyordu.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC {CHILD_NAME} hears a soft 'Cik, cik, cik!' sound from outside her window., setting: Ela'nın yatak odası, pencere kenarı, mood: curious, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Pencereye Yaklaştı
scenes.text: Ela, merakla pencereye uzandı. Perdeyi yavaşça araladı. Sıcacık hava, içeri doldu.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC {CHILD_NAME} reaches for the window, gently parting the curtains as warm air enters., setting: Ela'nın yatak odası, pencere kenarı, mood: curious, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Sarı Bir Kuş
scenes.text: Küçük bir kuş, dalda duruyordu. Yumuşacık sarı tüyleri güneşte parlıyordu.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC A small bird sits on a branch, its soft yellow feathers glistening in the sun., setting: Ela'nın bahçesi, pencere dışı, mood: joyful, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Cik Şarkı Söyledi
scenes.text: Kuş, başını kaldırdı, gagasını açtı. 'Cik, cik, ciiik!' diye neşeyle şarkı söyledi.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC The bird lifts its head, opens its beak, and sings 'Cik, cik, ciiik!' joyfully., setting: Ela'nın bahçesi, pencere dışı, mood: joyful, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Ela Gülümsedi
scenes.text: Ela'nın yüzünde kocaman bir gülümseme belirdi. Kalbi, sevinçle doldu.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC A big smile appears on {CHILD_NAME}'s face, her heart fills with joy., setting: Ela'nın yatak odası, pencere kenarı, mood: joyful, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Nazik Bir Ses
scenes.text: Ela, minik kuşa usulca fısıldadı. 'Günaydın, Cik!' dedi.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC {CHILD_NAME} gently whispers to the little bird, saying 'Good morning, Cik!', setting: Ela'nın yatak odası, pencere kenarı, mood: warm, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Dostluk Şarkısı
scenes.text: Cik, başını çevirdi, Ela'ya baktı. Yine tatlı bir şarkı söyledi.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Cik turns its head, looks at {CHILD_NAME}, and sings another sweet song., setting: Ela'nın bahçesi, pencere dışı, mood: warm, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Yeni Bir Gün
scenes.text: Ela, Cik'in şarkısıyla güne başladı. İçinde şefkatli bir his yeşerdi.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC {CHILD_NAME} starts her day with Cik's song, a feeling of tenderness blossoms within her., setting: Ela'nın yatak odası, pencere kenarı, mood: inspirational, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Mutlu Sabah
scenes.text: Sabah, Cik'in sesiyle daha güzeldi. Ela'nın kalbinde şarkı devam etti.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC The morning is more beautiful with Cik's sound, the song continues in {CHILD_NAME}'s heart., setting: Ela'nın yatak odası, pencere kenarı, mood: triumphant-emotional, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? 🌿
facts: Kuşlar, dünyada yaklaşık 10.000 farklı türde yaşar.
Bazı kuşlar, sabahları güneş doğmadan önce şarkı söylemeye başlar.
Kuşların tüyleri onları hem sıcak tutar hem de uçmalarına yardımcı olur.

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? ⭐
facts: Kuşların kemikleri çok hafiftir, bu yüzden kolayca uçabilirler.
En küçük kuş, arı sinek kuşu adında, sadece bir parmak kadar küçüktür.
Kuşlar her gün böcek, tohum veya meyve gibi farklı yiyecekler yerler.

specialPagePrompts.heroPage: A beautiful premium children's storybook HERO PAGE in 2:3 portrait — themed decorative background matching "Cik'in Sabah Şarkısı". ABSOLUTELY NO CHILD CHARACTER, NO PEOPLE, NO HUMAN FIGURES anywhere on the page. Themed environment: Foreground: {CHILD_NAME}'s arm and partial face at the window. Midground: A small yellow bird on a branch, singing. Background: Soft green leaves and a bright morning sky.. TITLE (display EXACTLY as Turkish text, top 20% of the page): "Hikayemizin Kahramanı Ela" Typography: large playful HAND-LETTERED decorative title with rainbow/multi-color warm palette, sparkles and floating decorative elements around letters, drop shadow, cheerful children's book cover-level fun. Each word a slightly different warm color (gold, coral, rose, turquoise), letters may have tiny ornaments (stars, hearts, leaves). LAYOUT: title top 20%, LEAVE THE CENTER ~55% OF THE PAGE VISUALLY CALM (soft gradient or soft bokeh, no busy elements, no text, no objects) so a rectangular photo frame can be composited on top later. Bottom 25% may have tasteful themed decorative ornaments, flowers, sparkles, a ribbon. Turkish characters (ş ç ğ ü ö ı İ) MUST be perfect. No other text on page besides the title. Pixar 3D CGI animation style 3D CGI / painterly storybook illustration blend, ultra high detail, magazine-cover polish.
specialPagePrompts.funFactBg: A warm decorative themed background with sparkles and soft glow, NO TEXT NO LETTERS, 3D CGI illustration.
specialPagePrompts.senderNoteBg: A cozy warm background with soft golden light, NO TEXT NO LETTERS, 3D CGI render.
specialPagePrompts.backCover: A warm artistic closing scene matching "Cik'in Sabah Şarkısı". Minik Ela, penceresinden gelen tatlı bir kuş sesine uyanır. O sarı tüylü, sevimli kuş Cik'tir! Ela, bu yeni dostuna nazikçe 'Günaydın!' der ve kalbi sıcacık bir dostlukla dolar.. NO TEXT NO LETTERS in image, 3D CGI render.
